Interactive 3D Benchmark Comparison

Rotate, pan, and zoom each scene. Blue is MFI-PD, green is MFI-Geometric, orange is APF, purple is Haddadin, amber is Sabattini, teal is the start, black is the goal, and red obstacle geometry shows spheres or extruded polygon prisms.

single_sphere

Single sphere between start and goal.

double_sphere_gap

Two spheres with a narrow central passage.

sphere_cluster

Cluster of multiple spheres requiring repeated avoidance in 3D.

offset_cavity

A reachable non-convex-like cavity composed from offset spheres.

archway

A non-convex archway assembled from spheres that requires 3D routing.

convex_prism_block

A single convex rectangular prism crossing the direct path.

nonconvex_prism_u

A non-convex U-shaped prism whose opening truly faces the robot.
